site.name: Reto
site.tagline: Medical education platform connecting institutions, hospitals and industry with doctors.

hero.subtitle: Five pillars that sustain every Reto educational path.

pillar1.title: Accessibility
pillar1.description: Medical knowledge must be available where physicians need it: in their office, at the hospital, on their phone. We design every experience to work in real-world conditions: limited connections, short windows of time, diverse devices.
pillar1.placeholder: Illustration: multiple devices accessing the same content

pillar2.title: Case-Based Learning
pillar2.description: Medicine is learned by solving cases, not memorizing lists. Every Reto path is built on real clinical scenarios that force the physician to make decisions, justify them and review them.
pillar2.placeholder: Illustration: structure of an interactive clinical case

pillar3.title: Purposeful gamification
pillar3.description: We don't use points to entertain: we use progress systems to sustain motivation over months of training. Reto's gamification is designed by medical educators, not marketers.
pillar3.placeholder: Illustration: levels, achievements and progress system

pillar4.title: Analytics that matter
pillar4.description: Every interaction generates useful data: where a cohort gets stuck, which cases best discriminate between competence levels, which paths correlate with better clinical performance. Institutions receive dashboards designed for decision-making, not for show.

pillar5.title: Adaptive personalization
pillar5.description: Every physician arrives with a different starting point. Reto adapts the pace, depth and focus of each path based on individual performance, without sacrificing the program's rigor.
pillar5.placeholder: Illustration: adaptive path with divergent branches

hero.subtitle: The platform that connects those who teach medicine with those who practice and transform it.

problem.title: The problem
problem.intro: Medical education in Latin America faces three structural tensions that limit physicians' professional development.

point1.title: Fragmented access
point1.body: Clinical knowledge is unevenly distributed across institutions, regions and specialties.

point2.title: Missing metrics
point2.body: It is hard to measure the real impact of continuing education on clinical practice.

point3.title: A gap between actors
point3.body: Universities, hospitals and industry operate in silos, without a common channel to build education together.

manifesto.title: Our role in medical education
manifesto.body1: Reto was born from a conviction: medical education is where the quality of care patients will receive over the next decades is decided.
manifesto.body2: We are not a course repository or a certificate platform. We are an infrastructure that connects the institutions that train physicians, the hospitals that employ them, and the industry that produces the knowledge that keeps them current.
manifesto.body3: We build educational paths that respect the complexity of medicine and the rigor it demands.
manifesto.quote: Educating physicians is not transferring information. It is building judgment.

team.title: The team
team.subtitle: Physicians, educators, technologists and designers building the next generation of medical education.
